projects.name: Mission Control v1
projects.description: Stand up Mission Control as the operating system for Select Casting and Studio Awesome: leads, tasks, tools, calendar, memory, docs, and team.

projects.name: Studio Awesome Website
projects.description: Design and launch a focused Studio Awesome website that clearly explains services (mix, ADR, creative), showcases work, and supports lead capture.

projects.name: Studio Awesome Mix Booking App
projects.description: Build and ship the Studio Awesome Mix booking app so clients can easily view availability and book sessions.

projects.name: Select Casting Lead Gen - Small/Mid Agencies
projects.description: Design and implement a repeatable lead gen system for Select Casting focused on small and mid-sized ad agencies (ICP, lists, outreach, and tracking).

projects.name: ADR Leads - 2-Mile Radius of 1608 Argyle
projects.description: Build a lightweight system to identify and engage companies within ~2 miles of 1608 Argyle Ave that need ADR/audio post, and create a steady pipeline of local leads.

projects.name: Fractional Advertising Model
projects.description: Design and validate a fractional advertising service that brings brand strategy, creative, production, post, and business affairs together in a single app/service.

projects.name: Select Casting Blog Posts
projects.description: Plan and produce a series of SEO-focused blog posts for Select Casting to drive organic traffic around casting, production, and advertising topics.

projects.name: Lead Gen Integrations - Apollo / MillionVerifier / SmartReach
projects.description: Wire Scout and Echo to find, verify, and route leads from Apollo into Mission Control, MillionVerifier, and SmartReach campaigns.

projects.name: MikeGullickson.com Author Site
projects.description: Design, build, and deploy a dedicated author site for Mike (mikegullickson.com) that showcases The Northern Star trilogy, The Seethe, world art, reviews, and an updated author bio.

projects.name: The Promise (Novel)
projects.description: Editorial development of Mike's finished fantasy/apocalyptic novel. Protagonist: Amal (they/them), a genetically engineered soldier — 'amalgamate' — navigating identity and survival at the end of the world. Key decisions: commit to Amal/they-them throughout, shed 'Adam' as the state-assigned name. Title: The Promise (God's rainbow covenant, inverted). 107k words. Next: editorial pass chapter by chapter — pronoun/name consistency, prose tightening, structural notes.

projects.name: AI Mix Platform
projects.description: Build a web-based (PWA) audio production platform where clients can upload session takes, select and comp takes, get an AI-powered mix (via Dolby.io + Claude), give natural language feedback, and receive broadcast-ready deliverables. Engineer handoff for complex jobs. Powered by Studio Awesome + Select Casting. Phase 1: core pipeline + portal. Phase 2: natural language chat + comping. Phase 3: full booking + session workflow integration.

projects.name: Select Casting AI Chat + Rate Calculator
projects.description: Embed an AI chat assistant on selectcasting.com that handles client questions, intake, and includes a natural language rate calculator for SAG-AFTRA and GVAA non-union rates. Client types job details (union type, market, run length, spot length) and gets an instant rate quote including H&R contributions and optional casting/session fees.
